# vanta_vendors (Data Source)

List vendors, optionally filtered by name and status.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# All managed vendors.
data "vanta_vendors" "managed" {
  status_matches_any = ["MANAGED"]
}

output "managed_vendor_names" {
  value = [for v in data.vanta_vendors.managed.vendors : v.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) Filter vendors by name (case-insensitive partial match).
- `status_matches_any` (List of String) Filter to vendors whose status is any of these values.

### Read-Only

- `vendors` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--vendors))

<a id="nestedatt--vendors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `vendors`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Vendor ID.
- `inherent_risk_level` (String) Inherent risk level.
- `name` (String) Vendor name.
- `residual_risk_level` (String) Residual risk level.
- `status` (String) Vendor status.
- `website_url` (String) Vendor website URL.
